definition:
εκ-χύννω 
 Hellenistic form of ἐκχέω, which see (E1., § 17): Mat.23:35 26:28, Mrk.14:24, Luk.5:37 11:50 22:20, Act.1:18 10:45 22:20, Rom.5:5, Ju 11.†
 ἐκ-χωρέω, -ῶ 
 [in LXX: Num.16:45 (רוּם ni.), Jdg.7:3 (צָפַר), Amo.7:12 (בָּרַח), 1Es.4:44 Est.4:57, 1Ma.9:62 * ;] 
to depart, withdraw: Luk.21:21.†
 (AS)
